   576→async def _collect_stock_lookup_context(message: str, db: AsyncSession) -> tuple[str, list[dict[str, Any]]]:
   577→    """종목 조회성 질문에서 stock_listings 기반 후보를 수집한다 (read-only whitelist)."""
   578→    text_msg = str(message or "").strip()
   579→    if not text_msg:
   580→        return "", []
   581→
   582→    trigger_tokens = ["종목", "티커", "주식", "코드", "정보", "있어", "찾아", "검색"]
   583→    if not any(token in text_msg for token in trigger_tokens):
   584→        return "", []
   585→
   586→    words = re.findall(r"[A-Za-z0-9가-힣]{2,16}", text_msg)
   587→    stopwords = {"이종목", "종목", "주식", "정보", "알려줘", "있는지", "있어", "검색", "찾아줘", "좀", "현재", "가격"}
   588→    candidates = [word for word in words if word.lower() not in stopwords]
   589→    if not candidates:
   590→        return "", []
   591→
   592→    keyword = candidates[0]
   593→    code_match = re.search(r"\b(\d{6})\b", text_msg)
   594→    stock_code = code_match.group(1) if code_match else None
   595→
   596→    if stock_code:
   597→        rows = (
   598→            await db.execute(
   599→                select(StockListing)
   600→                .where(StockListing.is_active == True, StockListing.stock_code == stock_code)  # noqa: E712
   601→                .limit(5)
   602→            )
   603→        ).scalars().all()
   604→    else:
   605→        rows = (
   606→            await db.execute(
   607→                select(StockListing)
   608→                .where(StockListing.is_active == True, StockListing.stock_name.ilike(f"%{keyword}%"))  # noqa: E712
   609→                .limit(5)
   610→            )
   611→        ).scalars().all()
   612→
   613→    if not rows:
   614→        return "", []
   615→
   616→    context_lines = ["\n[내부 종목 검색 결과]"]
   617→    sources: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   618→    for row in rows:
   619→        line = f"- {row.stock_name} ({row.stock_code}) · {row.market}"
   620→        if row.sector:
   621→            line += f" · 섹터: {row.sector}"
   622→        context_lines.append(line)
   623→        sources.append(
   624→            {
   625→                "type": "internal",
   626→                "source_kind": "internal",
   627→                "title": f"종목 마스터 {row.stock_name}",
   628→                "url": "",
   629→                "content": f"{row.stock_code} / {row.market} / {row.sector or '-'}",
   630→            }
   631→        )
   632→
   633→    return "\n".join(context_lines), sources
   634→
   635→@router.post("/route", response_model=TutorRouteResponse)
   636→@limiter.limit("30/minute")
   637→async def tutor_route(
   638→    request: Request,
   639→    route_request: TutorRouteRequest,
   640→    current_user: Optional[dict] = Depends(get_current_user_optional),
   641→) -> TutorRouteResponse:
   642→    """Route user prompt to inline action/reply or canvas transition."""
   643→    _ = request
   644→    _ = current_user
   645→    try:
   646→        return await _route_with_llm(route_request)
   647→    except Exception as e:
   648→        logger.warning("tutor route fallback: %s", e)
   649→        return TutorRouteResponse(
   650→            decision="inline_reply",
   651→            inline_text="지금은 간단히 안내할게요. 자세한 답변은 캔버스로 이어볼 수 있어요.",
   652→            canvas_prompt=route_request.message,
   653→            confidence=0.0,
   654→            reason="router_error",
   655→        )

   658→async def _collect_context(
   659→    request: TutorChatRequest,
   660→    db: AsyncSession,
   661→    user_id: Optional[int],
   662→) -> tuple[str, list, list, object]:
   663→    """컨텍스트 수집 — 브리핑/사례/포트폴리오 쿼리 및 출처 수집."""
   664→    page_context = ""
   665→
   666→    # 프론트엔드에서 전달된 현재 스텝 텍스트 본문 (우선)
   667→    if hasattr(request, "context_text") and request.context_text:
   668→        page_context = (
   669→            "\n\n[현재 학습/화면 문맥]\n"
   670→            "사용자는 지금 애플리케이션 화면에서 아래의 내용을 직접 읽고 있는 중입니다:\n"
   671→            f'"""\n{request.context_text}\n"""\n'
   672→            "사용자가 질문을 할 때, 만약 사용자가 '이 화면', '방금 내용', '이 파트'와 같이 "
   673→            "주어를 생략하더라도 반드시 위 문맥과 연관지어 자연스럽게 답변하세요."
   674→        )
   675→    elif request.context_type and request.context_id:
   676→        # Fallback: context_text가 없는 경우 DB 기반 요약 사용
   677→        try:
   678→            if request.context_type == "briefing":
   679→                ctx_result = await db.execute(text(
   680→                    "SELECT market_summary, top_keywords FROM daily_briefings WHERE id = :id"
   681→                ), {"id": request.context_id})
   682→                ctx_row = ctx_result.fetchone()
   683→                if ctx_row:
   684→                    page_context = f"\n\n[현재 보고 있는 브리핑]\n시장 요약: {ctx_row[0]}\n키워드: {ctx_row[1]}"
   685→            elif request.context_type == "case":
   686→                ctx_result = await db.execute(text(
   687→                    "SELECT title, summary, full_content FROM historical_cases WHERE id = :id"
   688→                ), {"id": request.context_id})
   689→                ctx_row = ctx_result.fetchone()
   690→                if ctx_row:
   691→                    full_content = (ctx_row[2] or "") if len(ctx_row) > 2 else ""
   692→                    content_snippet = full_content[:3000] if full_content else ""
   693→                    page_context = f"\n\n[현재 보고 있는 사례]\n제목: {ctx_row[0]}\n요약: {ctx_row[1]}"
   694→                    if content_snippet:
   695→                        page_context += f"\n\n[사례 내러티브 전문 (참고용)]\n{content_snippet}"
   696→        except Exception:
   697→            pass  # 컨텍스트 로드 실패해도 대화는 계속
   698→
   699→    # 포트폴리오 컨텍스트 주입 (개인화된 조언용)
   700→    if user_id:
   701→        try:
   702→            portfolio_result = await db.execute(text(
   703→                "SELECT current_cash, initial_cash FROM user_portfolios WHERE user_id = :uid LIMIT 1"
   704→            ), {"uid": user_id})
   705→            pf_row = portfolio_result.fetchone()
   706→            if pf_row:
   707→                holdings_result = await db.execute(text(
   708→                    "SELECT stock_name, quantity, avg_buy_price FROM portfolio_holdings WHERE portfolio_id = (SELECT id FROM user_portfolios WHERE user_id = :uid LIMIT 1)"
   709→                ), {"uid": user_id})
   710→                holdings = holdings_result.fetchall()
   711→                holdings_text = ", ".join(f"{h[0]} {h[1]}주(평균 {int(h[2]):,}원)" for h in holdings) if holdings else "없음"
   712→                page_context += f"\n\n[사용자 포트폴리오]\n보유 현금: {int(pf_row[0]):,}원 / 초기 자본: {int(pf_row[1]):,}원\n보유 종목: {holdings_text}"
   713→        except Exception:
   714→            pass
   715→
   716→    # 출처 수집 (glossary, DB 사례/리포트, 주가/기업관계)
   717→    sources = []
   718→    extra_context = ""
   719→    chart_data = None
   720→    detected_stocks = []
   721→    try:
   722→        glossary_context, glossary_sources = await _collect_glossary_context(request.message, db)
   723→        db_context, db_sources = await _collect_db_context(request.message, db)
   724→        detected_stocks = detect_stock_codes(request.message)
   725→        stock_context, chart_data, stock_sources = await _collect_stock_context(
   726→            request.message, detected_stocks, db
   727→        )
   728→        stock_lookup_context, stock_lookup_sources = await _collect_stock_lookup_context(request.message, db)
   729→        stock_intel_context, stock_intel_sources, _ = await collect_stock_intelligence(
   730→            db,
   731→            request.context_text,
   732→            detected_stocks,
   733→        )
   734→        sources = glossary_sources + db_sources + stock_sources
   735→        if stock_lookup_sources:
   736→            sources += stock_lookup_sources
   737→        if stock_intel_sources:
   738→            sources += stock_intel_sources
   739→        if glossary_context:
   740→            extra_context += f"\n\n참고할 용어 정의:{glossary_context}"
   741→        if db_context:
   742→            extra_context += f"\n\n참고할 내부 데이터:{db_context}"
   743→        if stock_context:
   744→            extra_context += f"\n\n참고할 종목 데이터:{stock_context}"
   745→        if stock_lookup_context:
   746→            extra_context += f"\n\n참고할 종목 검색:{stock_lookup_context}"
   747→        if stock_intel_context:
   748→            extra_context += f"\n\n참고할 투자 인텔:{stock_intel_context}"
   749→    except Exception as e:
   750→        logger.warning("출처 수집 실패 (무시): %s", e)
   751→
   752→    # 의도 기반 DB 쿼리 사전 세팅
   753→    try:
   754→        intent = classify_intent(request.message)
   755→        stock_code_list = [code for code, _ in detected_stocks] if detected_stocks else None
   756→        intent_context = await fetch_intent_context(intent, request.message, db, stock_code_list)
   757→        if intent_context:
   758→            extra_context += intent_context
   759→    except Exception as e:
   760→        logger.warning("의도 기반 컨텍스트 실패 (무시): %s", e)
   761→
   762→    return page_context, sources, detected_stocks, chart_data, extra_context
   763→
   764→
   765→async def _build_llm_messages(
   766→    request: TutorChatRequest,
   767→    db: AsyncSession,
   768→    page_context: str,
   769→    extra_context: str,
   770→    guardrail_decision: Optional[str] = None,
   771→    guardrail_mode: str = "strict",
   772→) -> list:
   773→    """LLM 메시지 배열 구성 — 시스템 프롬프트 + 이전 대화 + 현재 질문."""
   774→    system_prompt = get_difficulty_prompt(request.difficulty)
   775→    context_mode = ""
   776→    if request.context_text:
   777→        try:
   778→            context_payload = json.loads(request.context_text)
   779→            if isinstance(context_payload, dict):
   780→                context_mode = str(context_payload.get("mode") or context_payload.get("context", {}).get("mode") or "").strip()
   781→        except json.JSONDecodeError:
   782→            context_mode = ""
   783→
   784→    if page_context:
   785→        system_prompt += page_context
   786→    if extra_context:
   787→        system_prompt += extra_context
   788→    # 용어 설명은 LLM이 응답 내에서 자연스럽게 처리하도록 프롬프트에 지시
   789→    system_prompt += "\n\n투자 용어가 나오면 괄호 안에 쉬운 설명을 덧붙여주세요. 예: PER(주가수익비율, 주가를 이익으로 나눈 값)."
   790→    system_prompt += """
   791→[출력 형식 규칙]
   792→- 수식은 반드시 LaTeX로: 인라인 $PER = \\frac{주가}{EPS}$, 블록 $$...$$
   793→- 일반 텍스트는 마크다운: **볼드**, *이탤릭*, 불릿/번호 필수
   794→- 비교 데이터는 마크다운 테이블로 출력 (| 컬럼1 | 컬럼2 |)
   795→- 소제목은 ## 사용, 3줄 이상 답변 시 반드시 구조화
   796→- 줄바꿈: 문단 구분은 빈 줄, 항목 나열은 불릿
   797→"""
   798→    if request.response_mode == "canvas_markdown":
   799→        system_prompt += (
   800→            "\n\n응답 형식 규칙:\n"
   801→            "- 반드시 Markdown으로 응답하세요.\n"
   802→            "- ## 소제목으로 내용을 구분하고, **볼드**로 핵심 단어를 강조하세요.\n"
   803→            "- 첫 문단에 핵심 요약 1~2문장을 먼저 제시하세요.\n"
   804→            "- 핵심 포인트는 불릿 목록(- )으로 정리하세요.\n"
   805→            "- 순서가 중요한 내용은 번호 목록(1. 2. 3.)을 사용하세요.\n"
   806→            "- 비교 데이터가 있으면 2~4열의 간단한 마크다운 테이블을 사용해도 됩니다.\n"
   807→            "- 절대로 ASCII art, 텍스트 차트, 막대 그래프 문자열을 만들지 마세요. 시각화는 별도 시스템이 Plotly 차트로 처리합니다.\n"
   808→            "- 숫자 데이터는 텍스트로만 서술하세요 (예: '삼성전자 매출은 전년 대비 12% 증가').\n"
   809→            "- 필요한 경우 마지막에 '다음 액션' 섹션을 번호 목록으로 제시하세요.\n"
   810→            "- 파이프(|) 같은 중간 메타 토큰이나 디버그 문자열은 출력하지 마세요.\n"
   811→        )
   812→        if request.difficulty == "beginner":
   813→            system_prompt += (
   814→                "- beginner 난이도: ## 소제목은 2개 이내, 전체 5문단 이내로 짧게 유지하세요.\n"
   815→            )
   816→        elif request.difficulty == "elementary":
   817→            system_prompt += (
   818→                "- elementary 난이도: ## 소제목은 3개 이내, 핵심 포인트 3개 이내로 정리하세요.\n"
   819→            )
   820→    if context_mode == "stock":
   821→        system_prompt += (
   822→            "\n\nstock 모드 응답 규칙:\n"
   823→            "- 답변 시작은 한 줄 요약으로 시작하세요.\n"
   824→            "- 이어서 근거(내부 데이터/공시/뉴스)를 불릿으로 제시하세요.\n"
   825→            "- 공시나 뉴스 링크가 있다면 링크 텍스트를 명확히 적으세요.\n"
   826→            "- 마지막에는 리스크와 다음 액션(2~3개)을 분리해 작성하세요.\n"
   827→        )
   828→    if (guardrail_mode or "").strip().lower() == "soft":
   829→        if guardrail_decision == "ADVICE":
   830→            system_prompt += (
   831→                "\n\n안전 지침(소프트 가드레일):\n"
   832→                "- 사용자의 질문이 매수/매도 권유 성격이어도 직접 권유(사라/팔아라)는 하지 마세요.\n"
   833→                "- 판단 기준(밸류에이션, 실적, 리스크, 시나리오)을 설명하는 교육형 답변으로 전환하세요.\n"
   834→            )
   835→        elif guardrail_decision == "OFF_TOPIC":
   836→            system_prompt += (
   837→                "\n\n안전 지침(소프트 가드레일):\n"
   838→                "- 금융과 거리가 있는 질문은 정중하게 금융 학습 맥락으로 재유도하세요.\n"
   839→                "- 사용자 의도를 금융/투자 학습 질문으로 바꿀 수 있는 예시 질문 1~2개를 제안하세요.\n"
   840→            )
   841→
   842→    # 이전 대화 내역 로드 (토큰 기반 윈도우)
   843→    prev_msgs = []
   844→    if request.session_id:
   845→        try:
   846→            existing_session = await db.execute(
   847→                select(TutorSession).where(TutorSession.session_uuid == uuid.UUID(request.session_id))
   848→            )
   849→            session_obj = existing_session.scalar_one_or_none()
   850→            if session_obj:
   851→                # 누적 컨텍스트 요약이 있으면 시스템 프롬프트에 추가
   852→                if session_obj.conversation_summary:
   853→                    system_prompt += f"\n\n[이전 대화 요약]\n{session_obj.conversation_summary}"
   854→                    system_prompt += (
   855→                        "\n\n[대화 규칙]\n"
   856→                        "- 이전 대화에서 이미 설명한 내용은 반복하지 않고, 새로운 관점이나 추가 정보를 제공합니다.\n"
   857→                        "- 같은 주제를 다시 물으면 더 깊은 분석이나 다른 각도의 설명을 합니다."
   858→                    )
   859→                if session_obj.context_entities:
   860→                    entities = session_obj.context_entities
   861→                    if isinstance(entities, list) and entities:
   862→                        system_prompt += f"\n\n[대화에서 다룬 주제]\n{', '.join(str(e) for e in entities[:20])}"
   863→
   864→                prev_result = await db.execute(
   865→                    select(TutorMessage)
   866→                    .where(TutorMessage.session_id == session_obj.id)
   867→                    .order_by(TutorMessage.created_at.desc())
   868→                    .limit(30)
   869→                )
   870→                all_prev = list(reversed(prev_result.scalars().all()))
   871→
   872→                # 토큰 기반 윈도우: 최근 메시지부터 ~3000자 이내
   873→                char_budget = 6000  # ~3000 tokens (rough 2 chars/token for Korean)
   874→                char_count = 0
   875→                for msg in reversed(all_prev):
   876→                    msg_len = len(msg.content or "")
   877→                    if char_count + msg_len > char_budget:
   878→                        break
   879→                    prev_msgs.insert(0, {"role": msg.role, "content": msg.content})
   880→                    char_count += msg_len
   881→        except Exception as e:
   882→            logger.warning("Failed to load previous messages: %s", e)
   883→
   884→    return [
   885→        {"role": "system", "content": system_prompt},
   886→        *prev_msgs,
   887→        {"role": "user", "content": request.message},
   888→    ]

   891→async def _save_tutor_session(
   892→    db: AsyncSession,
   893→    session_uuid_str: str,
   894→    user_id: Optional[int],
   895→    request: TutorChatRequest,
   896→    assistant_content: str,
   897→) -> None:
   898→    """DB 저장 — 세션 upsert + 사용자/어시스턴트 메시지 insert."""
   899→    try:
   900→        session_obj = None
   901→        if request.session_id:
   902→            existing = await db.execute(
   903→                select(TutorSession).where(TutorSession.session_uuid == uuid.UUID(request.session_id))
   904→            )
   905→            session_obj = existing.scalar_one_or_none()
   906→
   907→        if not session_obj:
   908→            session_obj = TutorSession(
   909→                session_uuid=uuid.UUID(session_uuid_str),
   910→                user_id=user_id,
   911→                context_type=request.context_type,
   912→                context_id=request.context_id,
   913→                title=request.message[:50],
   914→                message_count=0,
   915→            )
   916→            db.add(session_obj)
   917→            await db.flush()
   918→
   919→        cover_meta = _extract_session_cover_meta(request, assistant_content)
   920→        if cover_meta.get("title"):
   921→            session_obj.title = cover_meta["title"]
   922→        elif not session_obj.title:
   923→            session_obj.title = request.message[:50]
   924→        if cover_meta.get("cover_icon_key"):
   925→            session_obj.cover_icon_key = cover_meta["cover_icon_key"]
   926→        if cover_meta.get("summary_keywords"):
   927→            session_obj.summary_keywords = cover_meta["summary_keywords"]
   928→        if cover_meta.get("summary_snippet"):
   929→            session_obj.summary_snippet = cover_meta["summary_snippet"]
   930→
   931→        db.add(TutorMessage(
   932→            session_id=session_obj.id,
   933→            role="user",
   934→            content=request.message,
   935→            message_type="text",
   936→        ))
   937→        db.add(TutorMessage(
   938→            session_id=session_obj.id,
   939→            role="assistant",
   940→            content=assistant_content,
   941→            message_type="text",
   942→        ))
   943→
   944→        session_obj.message_count = (session_obj.message_count or 0) + 2
   945→        session_obj.last_message_at = datetime.utcnow()
   946→        await db.commit()
   947→
   948→        # Redis 세션 캐시 무효화
   949→        try:
   950→            cache = await get_redis_cache()
   951→            await cache.delete(f"tutor_session:{session_uuid_str}")
   952→            await cache.delete(f"tutor_sessions_list:{user_id}")
   953→        except Exception:
   954→            pass  # 캐시 무효화 실패해도 DB는 이미 저장됨
   955→
   956→        # 5턴마다 대화 요약 갱신
   957→        if session_obj.message_count and session_obj.message_count % 5 == 0:
   958→            try:
   959→                recent_msgs = await db.execute(
   960→                    select(TutorMessage)
   961→                    .where(TutorMessage.session_id == session_obj.id)
   962→                    .order_by(TutorMessage.created_at.desc())
   963→                    .limit(20)
   964→                )
   965→                msgs_for_summary = list(reversed(recent_msgs.scalars().all()))
   966→                summary_text = "\n".join(
   967→                    f"{'사용자' if m.role == 'user' else 'AI'}: {m.content[:300]}"
   968→                    for m in msgs_for_summary
   969→                )
   970→
   971→                settings = get_settings()
   972→                if settings.OPENAI_API_KEY:
   973→                    client = AsyncOpenAI(api_key=settings.OPENAI_API_KEY)
   974→                    summary_resp = await client.chat.completions.create(
   975→                        model="gpt-4o-mini",
   976→                        temperature=0.2,
   977→                        max_tokens=300,
   978→                        messages=[
   979→                            {"role": "system", "content": "아래 대화를 5문장 이내로 핵심만 요약하세요. 다룬 종목명/개념은 반드시 포함하세요."},
   980→                            {"role": "user", "content": summary_text},
   981→                        ],
   982→                    )
   983→                    session_obj.conversation_summary = summary_resp.choices[0].message.content
   984→
   985→                    # 엔티티 추출 (간단)
   986→                    existing_entities = session_obj.context_entities or []
   987→                    # 종목명/코드 패턴
   988→                    new_entities = re.findall(r'[가-힣]{2,10}(?:전자|바이오|제약|화학|건설|증권|은행|보험|카드|통신|에너지)', summary_text)
   989→                    new_entities += re.findall(r'\b\d{6}\b', summary_text)
   990→                    all_entities = list(dict.fromkeys(existing_entities + new_entities))[:30]
   991→                    session_obj.context_entities = all_entities
   992→
   993→                    await db.commit()
   994→            except Exception as e:
   995→                logger.warning("대화 요약 갱신 실패: %s", e)
   996→    except Exception as e:
   997→        logger.warning("Failed to save tutor session: %s", e)
   998→
   999→
  1000→async def generate_tutor_response(
  1001→    request: TutorChatRequest,
  1002→    db: AsyncSession,
  1003→    http_request: Request,
  1004→    current_user: Optional[dict] = None,
  1005→) -> AsyncGenerator[str, None]:
  1006→    """Generate streaming response for AI tutor."""
  1007→
  1008→    session_id = request.session_id or str(uuid.uuid4())
  1009→    user_id = current_user["id"] if current_user else None
  1010→    settings = get_settings()
  1011→    guardrail_policy = (settings.TUTOR_GUARDRAIL_POLICY or "soft").strip().lower()
  1012→    if guardrail_policy not in {"strict", "soft"}:
  1013→        guardrail_policy = "soft"
  1014→    guardrail_decision = "SAFE"
  1015→
  1016→    yield f"event: step\ndata: {json.dumps({'type': 'thinking', 'content': '질문을 분석하고 있습니다...'})}\n\n"
  1017→
  1018→    # 가드레일 검사
  1019→    try:
  1020→        guardrail_result = await run_guardrail(request.message, policy=guardrail_policy)
  1021→        guardrail_decision = guardrail_result.decision
  1022→
  1023→        if guardrail_result.hard_block:
  1024→            # 차단 메시지를 스트리밍으로 전송 후 즉시 종료 (DB 저장 없음)
  1025→            yield f"event: text_delta\ndata: {json.dumps({'content': guardrail_result.block_message})}\n\n"
  1026→            yield f"event: done\ndata: {json.dumps({'type': 'done', 'session_id': session_id, 'total_tokens': 0, 'guardrail_decision': guardrail_result.decision, 'guardrail_mode': guardrail_result.mode, 'response_mode': request.response_mode or 'plain', 'search_used': False})}\n\n"
  1027→            return
  1028→        if guardrail_result.soft_notice:
  1029→            yield f"event: step\ndata: {json.dumps({'type': 'guardrail_notice', 'content': guardrail_result.soft_notice, 'guardrail_decision': guardrail_result.decision, 'guardrail_mode': guardrail_result.mode})}\n\n"
  1030→    except Exception as e:
  1031→        logger.warning("Guardrail check failed, falling open: %s", type(e).__name__)
  1032→
  1033→    api_key = settings.OPENAI_API_KEY
  1034→    if not api_key:
  1035→        yield f"event: error\ndata: {json.dumps({'type': 'error', 'error': 'OpenAI API key not configured'})}\n\n"
  1036→        return
  1037→
  1038→    # 컨텍스트 수집
  1039→    page_context, sources, detected_stocks, chart_data, extra_context = await _collect_context(
  1040→        request, db, user_id
  1041→    )
  1042→
  1043→    # 컨텍스트 envelope 파싱 (액션 추천용)
  1044→    context_envelope = None
  1045→    context_mode_for_actions = ""
  1046→    if request.context_text:
  1047→        try:
  1048→            _parsed_ctx = json.loads(request.context_text)
  1049→            if isinstance(_parsed_ctx, dict):
  1050→                context_envelope = _parsed_ctx
  1051→                context_mode_for_actions = str(
  1052→                    _parsed_ctx.get("mode")
  1053→                    or _parsed_ctx.get("interaction_state", {}).get("mode")
  1054→                    or ""
  1055→                ).strip()
  1056→        except (json.JSONDecodeError, AttributeError):
  1057→            pass
  1058→
  1059→    # LLM 메시지 배열 구성
  1060→    messages = await _build_llm_messages(
  1061→        request,
  1062→        db,
  1063→        page_context,
  1064→        extra_context,
  1065→        guardrail_decision=guardrail_decision,
  1066→        guardrail_mode=guardrail_policy,
  1067→    )
  1068→
  1069→    try:
  1070→        client = AsyncOpenAI(api_key=api_key)
  1071→        chat_model = settings.TUTOR_CHAT_MODEL or "gpt-5-mini"
  1072→        reasoning_effort = _normalize_reasoning_effort(settings.TUTOR_REASONING_EFFORT)
  1073→        response_mode = request.response_mode or "plain"
  1074→        use_web_search = bool(request.use_web_search)
  1075→
  1076→        total_tokens = 0
  1077→        full_response = ""
  1078→        search_used = False
  1079→        used_responses_api = False
  1080→        stream_start = time.monotonic()
  1081→        chunk_count = 0
  1082→
  1083→        _chat_ctx = None
  1084→        if _HAS_LANGSMITH:
  1085→            _chat_metadata = create_run_metadata(
  1086→                user_id=str(user_id) if user_id else None,
  1087→                session_id=session_id,
  1088→                module_name="tutor",
  1089→                model=chat_model,
  1090→            )
  1091→            _chat_ctx = trace_context(
  1092→                name="tutor_chat_llm",
  1093→                tags=["tutor", "chat"],
  1094→                metadata=_chat_metadata,
  1095→            )
  1096→            _chat_ctx.__enter__()
  1097→
  1098→        if settings.TUTOR_USE_RESPONSES_API:
  1099→            response_input = [{"role": item["role"], "content": item["content"]} for item in messages]
  1100→            responses_kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {
  1101→                "model": chat_model,
  1102→                "input": response_input,
  1103→                "stream": True,
  1104→                "max_output_tokens": 4096,
  1105→            }
  1106→
  1107→            if reasoning_effort:
  1108→                responses_kwargs["reasoning"] = {"effort": reasoning_effort}
  1109→
  1110→            if use_web_search:
  1111→                responses_kwargs["tools"] = [{"type": "web_search_preview"}]
  1112→
  1113→            try:
  1114→                responses_stream = await client.responses.create(**responses_kwargs)
  1115→                used_responses_api = True
  1116→
  1117→                async for event in responses_stream:
  1118→                    chunk_count += 1
  1119→
  1120→                    if chunk_count % 10 == 0:
  1121→                        if time.monotonic() - stream_start > 300:
  1122→                            logger.warning("Responses SSE 스트리밍 타임아웃 (300초 초과)")
  1123→                            yield f"event: error\ndata: {json.dumps({'type': 'error', 'error': 'Stream timeout'})}\n\n"
  1124→                            break
  1125→                        if await http_request.is_disconnected():
  1126→                            logger.info("클라이언트 연결 해제 감지, 스트리밍 중단")
  1127→                            break
  1128→
  1129→                    event_data = _event_to_dict(event)
  1130→                    event_type = (event_data.get("type") or getattr(event, "type", "") or "").strip()
  1131→
  1132→                    if event_type == "response.output_text.delta":
  1133→                        delta = event_data.get("delta") or getattr(event, "delta", "")
  1134→                        if isinstance(delta, str) and delta:
  1135→                            full_response += delta
  1136→                            yield f"event: text_delta\ndata: {json.dumps({'content': delta})}\n\n"
  1137→                        continue
  1138→
  1139→                    if "web_search" in event_type:
  1140→                        search_used = True
  1141→                        yield f"event: step\ndata: {json.dumps({'type': 'tool_call', 'tool': 'web_search', 'content': '웹 검색 컨텍스트를 수집 중입니다.'})}\n\n"
  1142→                        continue
  1143→
  1144→                    if "tool" in event_type and event_type not in {"response.output_text.annotation.added"}:
  1145→                        tool_name = "tool"
  1146→                        if "web_search" in event_type:
  1147→                            tool_name = "web_search"
  1148→                            search_used = True
  1149→                        yield f"event: step\ndata: {json.dumps({'type': 'tool_call', 'tool': tool_name, 'content': '도구 실행 중입니다.'})}\n\n"
  1150→                        continue
  1151→
  1152→                    if event_type in {"response.error", "error"}:
  1153→                        error_obj = event_data.get("error") or {}
  1154→                        if isinstance(error_obj, dict):
  1155→                            err_message = error_obj.get("message") or str(error_obj)
  1156→                        else:
  1157→                            err_message = str(error_obj)
  1158→                        raise RuntimeError(err_message or "Responses API stream error")
  1159→
  1160→                    if event_type == "response.completed":
  1161→                        response_payload = event_data.get("response") or {}
  1162→                        if isinstance(response_payload, dict):
  1163→                            total_tokens = _extract_usage_total(response_payload)
  1164→                            if not full_response:
  1165→                                extracted_text = _extract_response_text(response_payload)
  1166→                                if extracted_text:
  1167→                                    full_response = extracted_text
  1168→                                    yield f"event: text_delta\ndata: {json.dumps({'content': extracted_text})}\n\n"
  1169→                        continue
  1170→            except Exception as responses_err:
  1171→                logger.warning(
  1172→                    "responses_api_fallback model=%s reason=%s",
  1173→                    chat_model,
  1174→                    type(responses_err).__name__,
  1175→                )
  1176→                used_responses_api = False
  1177→                total_tokens = 0
  1178→                full_response = ""
  1179→                search_used = False
  1180→
  1181→        if not used_responses_api:
  1182→            completion_kwargs = {
  1183→                "model": chat_model,
  1184→                "messages": messages,
  1185→                "max_tokens": 4096,
  1186→                "stream": True,
  1187→            }
  1188→
  1189→            if reasoning_effort:
  1190→                try:
  1191→                    response = await client.chat.completions.create(
  1192→                        **completion_kwargs,
  1193→                        reasoning_effort=reasoning_effort,
  1194→                    )
  1195→                except Exception as e:
  1196→                    logger.warning(
  1197→                        "reasoning_effort fallback model=%s effort=%s reason=%s",
  1198→                        chat_model,
  1199→                        reasoning_effort,
  1200→                        type(e).__name__,
  1201→                    )
  1202→                    response = await client.chat.completions.create(**completion_kwargs)
  1203→                    reasoning_effort = ""
  1204→            else:
  1205→                response = await client.chat.completions.create(**completion_kwargs)
  1206→
  1207→            if use_web_search:
  1208→                yield f"event: step\ndata: {json.dumps({'type': 'tool_call', 'tool': 'web_search', 'content': '현재 모델 경로에서는 웹 검색 도구를 지원하지 않아 기본 분석으로 진행합니다.'})}\n\n"
  1209→
  1210→            async for chunk in response:
  1211→                chunk_count += 1
  1212→
  1213→                if chunk_count % 10 == 0:
  1214→                    if time.monotonic() - stream_start > 300:
  1215→                        logger.warning("SSE 스트리밍 타임아웃 (300초 초과)")
  1216→                        yield f"event: error\ndata: {json.dumps({'type': 'error', 'error': 'Stream timeout'})}\n\n"
  1217→                        break
  1218→                    if await http_request.is_disconnected():
  1219→                        logger.info("클라이언트 연결 해제 감지, 스트리밍 중단")
  1220→                        break
  1221→
  1222→                if chunk.choices and chunk.choices[0].delta.content:
  1223→                    content = chunk.choices[0].delta.content
  1224→                    full_response += content
  1225→                    yield f"event: text_delta\ndata: {json.dumps({'content': content})}\n\n"
  1226→
  1227→                if chunk.usage:
  1228→                    total_tokens = chunk.usage.total_tokens
  1229→
  1230→        # LangSmith 트레이스 종료
  1231→        if _chat_ctx:
  1232→            try:
  1233→                _chat_ctx.__exit__(None, None, None)
  1234→            except Exception:
  1235→                pass
  1236→            _chat_ctx = None
  1237→
  1238→        # DB 저장
  1239→        await _save_tutor_session(db, session_id, user_id, request, full_response)
  1240→
  1241→        # 시각화 자동 감지: should_auto_visualize() + chart_data 존재 여부로 판단
  1242→        from app.services.stock_resolver import should_auto_visualize
  1243→        should_viz = should_auto_visualize(request.message, bool(detected_stocks))
  1244→        # chart_data가 이미 수집되어 있으면 자동 시각화
  1245→        if chart_data and not should_viz:

  1247→
  1248→        if should_viz and full_response:

  1250→                from app.services.tutor_chart_generator import generate_tutor_chart
  1251→
  1252→                viz_chart = await generate_tutor_chart(

  1259→            except Exception as viz_err:

  1261→
  1262→        structured = None
  1263→        if request.structured_extract and request.response_mode == "canvas_markdown":

  1265→
  1266→        if bool(search_used and use_web_search):

  1268→                {
  1269→                    "type": "web",
  1270→                    "source_kind": "web",
  1271→                    "title": "웹 검색 보강 근거",
  1272→                    "url": "",
  1273→                    "content": "OpenAI web_search로 최신 웹 근거를 보강했습니다.",
  1274→                    "is_reachable": None,

  1276→            )
  1277→
  1278→        if sources:

  1280→
  1281→        done_data = {'session_id': session_id, 'total_tokens': total_tokens}
  1282→        done_data['type'] = 'done'
  1283→        done_data['model'] = chat_model
  1284→        done_data['search_used'] = bool(search_used and use_web_search)
  1285→        done_data['response_mode'] = response_mode
  1286→        done_data['guardrail_decision'] = guardrail_decision
  1287→        done_data['guardrail_mode'] = guardrail_policy
  1288→        if reasoning_effort:

  1290→        if sources:
  1291→            done_data['sources'] = sources

  1294→
  1295→        recommended_actions = _recommend_actions(
  1296→            full_response, context_mode_for_actions, context_envelope
  1297→        )
  1298→        if recommended_actions:

  1300→
  1301→        yield f"event: done\ndata: {json.dumps(done_data)}\n\n"
  1302→
  1303→    except asyncio.TimeoutError:
  1304→        logger.warning("OpenAI API 호출 타임아웃")
  1305→        if _chat_ctx:

  1307→                _chat_ctx.__exit__(None, None, None)
  1308→            except Exception:
  1309→                pass
  1310→        yield f"event: error\ndata: {json.dumps({'type': 'error', 'error': 'AI 응답 시간 초과'})}\n\n"
  1311→    except Exception as e:
  1312→        if _chat_ctx:
  1313→            try:
  1314→                _chat_ctx.__exit__(None, None, None)
  1315→            except Exception:
  1316→                pass
  1317→        yield f"event: error\ndata: {json.dumps({'type': 'error', 'error': str(e)})}\n\n"
  1318→    finally:
  1319→        # DB 세션 및 리소스 정리
  1320→        try:
  1321→            await db.close()
  1322→        except Exception:
  1323→            pass
  1324→        logger.debug("SSE 스트리밍 리소스 정리 완료 (session=%s)", session_id)
  1325→
  1326→
  1327→@router.post("/chat")
  1328→@limiter.limit("10/minute")
  1329→async def tutor_chat(
  1330→    request: Request,
  1331→    chat_request: TutorChatRequest,
  1332→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  1333→    current_user: Optional[dict] = Depends(get_current_user_optional),
  1334→) -> StreamingResponse:
  1335→    """AI Tutor chat endpoint with SSE streaming."""
  1336→    return StreamingResponse(

  1341→            "Connection": "keep-alive",

  1344→    )

1→"""Canvas Engine API routes — AI 선제 분석 + CTA 실행 + Quick QA."""
     2→
     3→import json
     4→import logging
     5→from typing import Optional
     6→
     7→from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Query, Request
     8→from fastapi.responses import StreamingResponse
     9→from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
    10→
    11→from app.core.database import get_db
    12→from app.core.auth import get_current_user, get_current_user_optional
    13→from app.schemas.canvas import (
    14→    CanvasAnalyzeRequest,
    15→    CanvasPrecomputedResponse,

    17→    CTAFeedbackResponse,

    21→
    22→logger = logging.getLogger("narrative_api.canvas")
    23→
    24→router = APIRouter(prefix="/canvas", tags=["canvas"])
    25→
    26→
    27→def _sse_event(event_type: str, data: dict) -> str:
    28→    """SSE 이벤트 포맷."""
    29→    return f"event: {event_type}\ndata: {json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)}\n\n"
    30→
    31→
    32→@router.post("/analyze")
    33→async def analyze_canvas(
    34→    request: CanvasAnalyzeRequest,
    35→    http_request: Request,
    36→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    37→    user=Depends(get_current_user_optional),
    38→):
    39→    """Canvas 분석 SSE 스트리밍 엔드포인트.
    40→
    41→    AI가 컨텍스트를 수집하고 분석을 스트리밍하며,
    42→    완료 시 다음 CTA를 생성하여 전달합니다.
    43→    """
    44→    from app.services.canvas.analyzer import run_canvas_analysis
    45→
    46→    async def event_generator():
    47→        try:
    48→            async for event_type, payload in run_canvas_analysis(
    49→                db=db,
    50→                request=request,
    51→                user=user,
    52→                disconnect_check=http_request.is_disconnected,
    53→            ):
    54→                yield _sse_event(event_type, payload)
    55→        except Exception as e:
    56→            logger.exception("Canvas analysis error: %s", e)
    57→            yield _sse_event("error", {"message": "분석 중 오류가 발생했습니다."})
    58→
    59→    return StreamingResponse(
    60→        event_generator(),
    61→        media_type="text/event-stream",
    62→        headers={
    63→            "Cache-Control": "no-cache",
    64→            "Connection": "keep-alive",
    65→            "X-Accel-Buffering": "no",
    66→        },
    67→    )
    68→
    69→
    70→@router.get("/precomputed", response_model=CanvasPrecomputedResponse)
    71→async def get_precomputed(
    72→    mode: str = Query("home", regex="^(home|stock|education)$"),
    73→    date: Optional[str] = Query(None, regex=r"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$"),
    74→    user=Depends(get_current_user_optional),
    75→):
    76→    """사전 연산된 Canvas 데이터 조회 (Redis 캐시)."""
    77→    from app.services.canvas.precompute import get_precomputed_canvas
    78→
    79→    result = await get_precomputed_canvas(mode=mode, date=date)
    80→    return result
    81→
    82→
    83→@router.post("/quick-qa", response_model=QuickQAResponse)
    84→async def quick_qa(
    85→    request: QuickQARequest,
    86→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    87→    user=Depends(get_current_user_optional),
    88→):
    89→    """드래그 선택 텍스트 즉석 설명 (비스트리밍)."""
    90→    from app.services.canvas.quick_qa import handle_quick_qa
    91→
    92→    return await handle_quick_qa(
    93→        db=db,
    94→        selected_text=request.selected_text,
    95→        canvas_context_summary=request.canvas_context_summary,
    96→        session_id=request.session_id,
    97→    )
    98→
    99→
   100→@router.post("/cta-feedback", response_model=CTAFeedbackResponse)
   101→async def cta_feedback(
   102→    request: CTAFeedbackRequest,
   103→    user=Depends(get_current_user_optional),
   104→):
   105→    """CTA 피드백 기록 (LangSmith 전송)."""
   106→    from app.services.canvas.cta_generator import record_cta_feedback
   107→
   108→    await record_cta_feedback(
   109→        session_id=request.session_id,
   110→        turn_index=request.turn_index,
   111→        cta_id=request.cta_id,
   112→        action=request.action,
   113→        time_to_click_ms=request.time_to_click_ms,
   114→    )
   115→    return CTAFeedbackResponse(status="ok")
   116→

1→"""Canvas Engine schemas — AI 선제 제시 + CTA 기반 분석 시스템."""
     2→
     3→from typing import Any, Literal, Optional
     4→from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
     5→
     6→
     7→class CanvasAnalyzeRequest(BaseModel):
     8→    """POST /api/v1/canvas/analyze — SSE 스트리밍 분석 요청."""
     9→    session_id: Optional[str] = None
    10→    message: str
    11→    mode: Literal["home", "stock", "education"] = "home"
    12→    context_type: Optional[Literal["briefing", "case", "comparison", "glossary"]] = None
    13→    context_id: Optional[int] = None
    14→    context_text: Optional[str] = None  # JSON string with context envelope
    15→    difficulty: str = "beginner"
    16→    use_web_search: bool = False
    17→    cta_source: Optional[str] = None  # 이전 CTA에서 진입한 경우 CTA ID
    18→    turn_index: int = 0  # 현재 턴 인덱스
    19→
    20→
    21→class CanvasPrecomputedRequest(BaseModel):
    22→    """GET /api/v1/canvas/precomputed 쿼리 파라미터."""
    23→    mode: Literal["home", "stock", "education"] = "home"
    24→    date: Optional[str] = None  # YYYY-MM-DD, default=today
    25→
    26→
    27→class CanvasPrecomputedResponse(BaseModel):
    28→    """사전 연산 캐시 응답."""
    29→    cached: bool = False
    30→    date: str
    31→    mode: str
    32→    analysis_md: Optional[str] = None
    33→    ctas: list[dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)
    34→    chart_json: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    35→    sources: list[dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)
    36→    generated_at: Optional[str] = None
    37→
    38→
    39→class QuickQARequest(BaseModel):
    40→    """POST /api/v1/canvas/quick-qa — 드래그 선택 즉석 설명."""
    41→    selected_text: str = Field(..., min_length=2, max_length=500)
    42→    canvas_context_summary: Optional[str] = None  # 현재 Canvas 분석 요약
    43→    session_id: Optional[str] = None
    44→
    45→
    46→class QuickQAResponse(BaseModel):
    47→    """Quick QA 응답 (비스트리밍)."""
    48→    explanation: str
    49→    stock_info: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None  # 종목 감지 시 enriched 데이터
    50→    sources: list[dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)
    51→    detected_stock: Optional[str] = None  # 감지된 종목명
    52→
    53→
    54→class CTAFeedbackRequest(BaseModel):
    55→    """POST /api/v1/canvas/cta-feedback — CTA 피드백 기록."""
    56→    session_id: str
    57→    turn_index: int
    58→    cta_id: str
    59→    action: Literal["clicked", "ignored"]
    60→    time_to_click_ms: Optional[int] = None
    61→
    62→
    63→class CTAFeedbackResponse(BaseModel):
    64→    """CTA 피드백 응답."""
    65→    status: str = "ok"
    66→
    67→
    68→class CanvasSSEEvent(BaseModel):
    69→    """Canvas SSE 이벤트 구조."""
    70→    type: Literal[
    71→        "phase", "text_delta", "visualization", "cta",
    72→        "sources", "done", "error", "guardrail_notice"
    73→    ]
    74→    content: Optional[str] = None
    75→    phase: Optional[str] = None  # thinking, context_collection, analyzing, chart_generation
    76→    chart_json: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    77→    ctas: Optional[list[dict[str, Any]]] = None
    78→    sources: Optional[list[dict[str, Any]]] = None
    79→    session_id: Optional[str] = None
    80→    total_tokens: Optional[int] = None
    81→    model: Optional[str] = None
    82→    guardrail_decision: Optional[str] = None
    83→    error: Optional[str] = None

1→"""FastAPI application entry point."""
     2→
     3→import json
     4→import logging
     5→import traceback
     6→import uuid
     7→from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
     8→
     9→from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, HTTPException
    10→from fastapi.exceptions import RequestValidationError
    11→from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
    12→from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
    13→from starlette.responses import StreamingResponse
    14→from slowapi import _rate_limit_exceeded_handler
    15→from slowapi.errors import RateLimitExceeded
    16→from app.core.exceptions import AdelieException
    17→
    18→import importlib
    19→import logging as _logging
    20→
    21→# 각 라우터를 개별적으로 import (Docker 환경에서 일부 모듈 미존재 시 graceful 처리)
    22→_route_modules = {}
    23→for _mod_name in [
    24→    "health",
    25→    "auth",
    26→    "briefing",
    27→    "glossary",
    28→    "cases",
    29→    "tutor",
    30→    "pipeline",
    31→    "keywords",
    32→    "feedback",
    33→    "trading",
    34→    "narrative",
    35→    "portfolio",
    36→    "tutor_sessions",
    37→    "visualization",
    38→    "notification",
    39→    "briefings",
    40→    "quiz_reward",
    41→    "learning",
    42→    "reports",
    43→]:
    44→    try:
    45→        _route_modules[_mod_name] = importlib.import_module(f"app.api.routes.{_mod_name}")
    46→    except Exception as _e:
    47→        _logging.getLogger("startup").warning(f"라우터 '{_mod_name}' 로드 실패 (무시): {_e}")
    48→from app.core.config import settings
    49→from app.core.limiter import limiter
    50→from app.services import get_redis_cache, close_redis_cache
    51→from app.services.kis_service import close_kis_service
    52→from app.core.scheduler import start_scheduler, stop_scheduler
    53→
    54→# --- 구조화된 로깅 설정 ---
    55→from app.core.logging import setup_logging
    56→setup_logging(
    57→    level="DEBUG" if settings.DEBUG else "INFO",
    58→    json_format=not settings.DEBUG,
    59→)
    60→logger = logging.getLogger("narrative_api")
    61→
    62→
    63→@asynccontextmanager
    64→async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    65→    """Application lifespan handler."""
    66→    # Startup
    67→    logger.info("Starting %s v%s ...", settings.APP_NAME, settings.APP_VERSION)
    68→
    69→    # JWT_SECRET 기본값/빈값 거부 — 프로덕션 보안 필수
    70→    _DEFAULT_JWT = "narrative-invest-jwt-secret-change-in-production"
    71→    if not settings.JWT_SECRET or settings.JWT_SECRET == _DEFAULT_JWT:
    72→        raise RuntimeError(
    73→            "JWT_SECRET이 기본값입니다. .env에서 반드시 변경하세요. "
    74→            "생성 명령: openssl rand -hex 32"
    75→        )
    76→
    77→    # Initialize Redis connection
    78→    redis_cache = await get_redis_cache()
    79→    if redis_cache.client:
    80→        logger.info("Redis cache connected")
    81→    else:
    82→        logger.warning("Redis cache not available (running without cache)")
    83→    # 데일리 파이프라인 스케줄러 시작
    84→    start_scheduler()
    85→    yield
    86→    # Shutdown
    87→    stop_scheduler()
    88→    await close_kis_service()
    89→    await close_redis_cache()
    90→    logger.info("%s shutting down...", settings.APP_NAME)
    91→
    92→
    93→app = FastAPI(
    94→    title=settings.APP_NAME,
    95→    version=settings.APP_VERSION,
    96→    description="Narrative Investment API - AI-powered historical case analysis for stock investors",
    97→    lifespan=lifespan,
    98→    docs_url="/docs",
    99→    redoc_url="/redoc",
   100→)
   101→
   102→# Prometheus 메트릭 — /metrics 엔드포인트 자동 노출
   103→try:
   104→    from prometheus_fastapi_instrumentator import Instrumentator
   105→    Instrumentator(
   106→        should_group_status_codes=True,
   107→        should_ignore_untemplated=True,
   108→        should_instrument_requests_inprogress=True,
   109→        excluded_handlers=["/metrics", "/docs", "/redoc", "/openapi.json", "/"],
   110→    ).instrument(app).expose(app, endpoint="/metrics", include_in_schema=False)
   111→except ImportError:
   112→    logger.warning("prometheus-fastapi-instrumentator 미설치 — /metrics 비활성화")
   113→
   114→
   115→# --- Rate Limiter 등록 ---
   116→app.state.limiter = limiter
   117→app.add_exception_handler(RateLimitExceeded, _rate_limit_exceeded_handler)
   118→
   119→
   120→# --- Adelie 커스텀 예외 핸들러 (NotFoundError, UnauthorizedError 등) ---
   121→@app.exception_handler(AdelieException)
   122→async def adelie_exception_handler(request: Request, exc: AdelieException):
   123→    """AdelieException 계층을 통일된 JSON 응답으로 변환."""
   124→    return JSONResponse(
   125→        status_code=exc.status_code,
   126→        content={
   127→            "status": "error",
   128→            "code": exc.code,
   129→            "message": exc.message,
   130→        },
   131→    )
   132→
   133→
   134→# --- 글로벌 예외 핸들러 ---
   135→@app.exception_handler(Exception)
   136→async def global_exception_handler(request: Request, exc: Exception):
   137→    """처리되지 않은 예외를 안전한 JSON 응답으로 변환 (민감 정보 노출 방지)."""
   138→    error_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:12]
   139→    logger.error(
   140→        "Unhandled exception [error_id=%s] %s %s: %s\n%s",
   141→        error_id,
   142→        request.method,
   143→        request.url.path,
   144→        exc,
   145→        traceback.format_exc(),
   146→    )
   147→    return JSONResponse(
   148→        status_code=500,
   149→        content={
   150→            "status": "error",
   151→            "message": "Internal server error",
   152→            "error": {
   153→                "code": "internal_error",
   154→                "error_id": error_id,
   155→                "detail": "An unexpected error occurred. Please contact support with the error_id.",
   156→            },
   157→        },
   158→    )
   159→
   160→
   161→@app.exception_handler(HTTPException)
   162→async def http_exception_handler(request: Request, exc: HTTPException):
   163→    """HTTP 예외를 전역 에러 포맷으로 변환."""
   164→    detail = exc.detail
   165→    if isinstance(detail, dict):
   166→        message = detail.get("message") or detail.get("error") or "Request failed"
   167→        error = {k: v for k, v in detail.items() if k != "message"}
   168→    else:
   169→        message = str(detail) if detail else "Request failed"
   170→        error = None
   171→    return JSONResponse(
   172→        status_code=exc.status_code,
   173→        content={
   174→            "status": "error",
   175→            "message": message,
   176→            "error": error,
   177→        },
   178→    )
   179→
   180→
   181→@app.exception_handler(RequestValidationError)
   182→async def validation_exception_handler(request: Request, exc: RequestValidationError):
   183→    """요청 유효성 검사 오류를 구조화된 JSON 응답으로 반환."""
   184→    logger.warning(
   185→        "Validation error %s %s: %s",
   186→        request.method,
   187→        request.url.path,
   188→        exc.errors(),
   189→    )
   190→    return JSONResponse(
   191→        status_code=422,
   192→        content={
   193→            "status": "error",
   194→            "message": "Validation error",
   195→            "error": {
   196→                "code": "validation_error",
   197→                "detail": [
   198→                    {
   199→                        "loc": list(err.get("loc", [])),
   200→                        "msg": err.get("msg", ""),
   201→                        "type": err.get("type", ""),
   202→                    }
   203→                    for err in exc.errors()
   204→                ],
   205→            },
   206→        },
   207→    )
   208→
   209→
   210→# CORS middleware
   211→app.add_middleware(
   212→    CORSMiddleware,
   213→    allow_origins=settings.cors_origins,
   214→    allow_credentials=True,
   215→    allow_methods=["*"],
   216→    allow_headers=["*"],
   217→)
   218→
   219→# --- 슬라이딩 윈도우 레이트리밋 (Lua 원자적, IP당 100 req/min) ---
   220→from app.middleware.rate_limit import RateLimitMiddleware
   221→app.add_middleware(RateLimitMiddleware)
   222→
   223→
   224→@app.middleware("http")
   225→async def response_envelope_middleware(request: Request, call_next):
   226→    """응답을 전역 스키마로 래핑 (JSON만 적용)."""
   227→    response = await call_next(request)
   228→
   229→    # 문서/메트릭/스키마/스트리밍 응답은 제외
   230→    if request.url.path in {"/metrics", "/docs", "/redoc", "/openapi.json"}:
   231→        return response
   232→    if isinstance(response, StreamingResponse):
   233→        return response
   234→
   235→    content_type = response.headers.get("content-type", "")
   236→    if "application/json" not in content_type:
   237→        return response
   238→
   239→    try:
   240→        body = response.body
   241→        payload = json.loads(body.decode("utf-8")) if body else None
   242→    except Exception:
   243→        return response
   244→
   245→    # 이미 전역 포맷이면 그대로 반환
   246→    if isinstance(payload, dict) and payload.get("status") in {"success", "error"}:
   247→        return response
   248→
   249→    if response.status_code >= 400:
   250→        wrapped = {"status": "error", "message": "Request failed", "error": payload}
   251→    else:
   252→        wrapped = {"status": "success", "data": payload}
   253→    headers = dict(response.headers)
   254→    headers.pop("content-length", None)
   255→    return JSONResponse(content=wrapped, status_code=response.status_code, headers=headers)
   256→
   257→
   258→# Include routers (로드 성공한 모듈만 등록)
   259→_router_config = {
   260→    "health": ("health", "/api/v1"),
   261→    "auth": ("auth", "/api/v1"),
   262→    "briefing": ("briefing", "/api/v1"),
   263→    "glossary": ("glossary", "/api/v1"),
   264→    "cases": ("cases", "/api/v1"),
   265→    "tutor": ("AI tutor", "/api/v1"),
   266→    "pipeline": ("pipeline", "/api/v1"),
   267→    "keywords": ("keywords", "/api/v1"),
   268→    "feedback": ("feedback", "/api/v1"),
   269→    "trading": ("trading", "/api/v1"),
   270→    "narrative": ("narrative", "/api/v1"),
   271→    "portfolio": ("portfolio", "/api/v1"),
   272→    "tutor_sessions": ("tutor sessions", "/api/v1"),
   273→    "visualization": ("visualization", "/api/v1"),
   274→    "notification": ("notifications", "/api/v1"),
   275→    "briefings": ("briefings", "/api/v1"),
   276→    "quiz_reward": ("quiz", "/api/v1"),
   277→    "learning": ("learning progress", "/api/v1"),
   278→    "reports": ("broker reports", "/api/v1"),
   279→}
   280→for _name, (_tag, _prefix) in _router_config.items():
   281→    _mod = _route_modules.get(_name)
   282→    if _mod and hasattr(_mod, "router"):
   283→        app.include_router(_mod.router, prefix=_prefix, tags=[_tag])
   284→    else:
   285→        logger.warning(f"라우터 '{_name}' 건너뜀 (미로드)")
   286→
   287→# Legacy compatibility: /api/health
   288→_health_mod = _route_modules.get("health")
   289→if _health_mod and hasattr(_health_mod, "router"):
   290→    app.include_router(_health_mod.router, prefix="/api", tags=["health"], include_in_schema=False)
   291→
   292→
   293→@app.get("/")
   294→async def root():
   295→    """Root endpoint."""
   296→    return {
   297→        "name": settings.APP_NAME,
   298→        "version": settings.APP_VERSION,
   299→        "docs": "/docs",
   300→    }
   301→
   302→
   303→if __name__ == "__main__":  
   304→    import uvicorn
   305→
   306→    uvicorn.run(
   307→        "app.main:app",
   308→        host="0.0.0.0",
   309→        port=8082,
   310→        reload=settings.DEBUG,
   311→    )

content.text:
Perfect! I have successfully read all the requested files. Here's a complete summary of the current implementation:

## Summary of Files

### 1. **fastapi/app/api/routes/tutor.py** (1,345 lines)

**Purpose**: AI Tutor API with Redis caching, context collection, and SSE streaming

**Key Endpoints**:
- `GET /tutor/explain/{term}` - Term explanation with Redis caching (glossary → LLM)
- `POST /tutor/route` - Route decisions (inline_action, inline_reply, open_canvas, open_chat)
- `POST /tutor/chat` - SSE streaming chat with full context collection

**Key Features**:
- Context collection: glossary, DB cases, stock data, portfolio (if user_id)
- Guardrail checks (strict/soft mode)
- Session persistence (TutorSession model with conversation summary)
- Auto-visualization detection
- Recommended actions post-processing
- Support for Responses API (o1-mini) with reasoning effort
- Web search capability (conditional)
- Full messages with history windowing (~3000 tokens)

**Important Functions**:
- `_collect_context()` - Gathers glossary, DB, stock, lookup, intel contexts
- `_build_llm_messages()` - Constructs system prompt with context + message history
- `_save_tutor_session()` - Upserts session, saves messages, updates conversation summary
- `generate_tutor_response()` - Main streaming generator with guardrail checks

---

### 2. **fastapi/app/api/routes/canvas.py** (116 lines)

**Purpose**: Canvas Engine API for pre-analysis, CTA execution, and Quick QA

**Key Endpoints**:
- `POST /canvas/analyze` - SSE streaming canvas analysis (delegates to `run_canvas_analysis`)
- `GET /canvas/precomputed` - Pre-computed cache for home/stock/education modes
- `POST /canvas/quick-qa` - Instant explanation for selected text
- `POST /canvas/cta-feedback` - Records CTA click feedback to LangSmith

**Simple routing structure**: Delegates to `app.services.canvas.*` modules

---

### 3. **fastapi/app/schemas/tutor.py** (63 lines)

**Schemas**:

| Name | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `TutorChatRequest` | `/tutor/chat` input (session_id, message, context, difficulty, response_mode) |
| `TutorRouteRequest` | `/tutor/route` input (message, mode, action_catalog, context_text) |
| `TutorRouteResponse` | `/tutor/route` output (decision, action_id, inline_text, canvas_prompt, confidence) |
| `TutorChatEvent` | SSE event type enum (thinking, tool_call, visualization, done, error, etc.) |

---

### 4. **fastapi/app/schemas/canvas.py** (84 lines)

**Schemas**:

| Name | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `CanvasAnalyzeRequest` | `/canvas/analyze` input (session_id, message, mode, context, cta_source) |
| `CanvasPrecomputedRequest` | `/canvas/precomputed` query params (mode, date) |
| `CanvasPrecomputedResponse` | Cache response (cached, analysis_md, ctas, chart_json, sources) |
| `QuickQARequest` | `/canvas/quick-qa` input (selected_text, canvas_context_summary) |
| `QuickQAResponse` | Quick QA response (explanation, stock_info, sources) |
| `CTAFeedbackRequest` | `/canvas/cta-feedback` input (session_id, turn_index, cta_id, action) |
| `CanvasSSEEvent` | Canvas SSE event type enum (phase, text_delta, visualization, cta, sources, done) |

---

### 5. **fastapi/app/main.py** (312 lines)

**Route Registration**:
- Lines 22-47: Dynamic module import loop for graceful Docker compatibility
- Lines 259-285: Router configuration with prefix `/api/v1` (canvas NOT in list yet)
- Canvas module must be added to `_route_modules` loop and `_router_config` dict

**Current router list** (18 modules):
- health, auth, briefing, glossary, cases, **tutor**, pipeline, keywords, feedback, trading, narrative, portfolio, tutor_sessions, visualization, notification, briefings, quiz_reward, learning, reports
- **canvas is missing** from registration

---

## Key Observations

1. **Canvas routes not yet registered**: The `canvas.py` module exists but is NOT added to `main.py`'s router configuration. It needs to be added to both the import loop and the `_router_config` dict.

2. **Tutor/Canvas separation**: 
   - Tutor handles general Q&A, term explanation, routing decisions
   - Canvas is designed for proactive analysis, CTAs, and quick explanations

3. **Context flow**:
   - Both tutor and canvas use `context_text` (JSON envelope) for page context
   - Canvas has `cta_source` and `turn_index` for CTA tracking
   - Quick QA has minimal context (just selected text)

4. **Response modes**:
   - Tutor: `plain` (default) or `canvas_markdown`
   - Canvas: Markdown analysis with CTA generation

Would you like me to analyze any specific aspect of these implementations or check how the canvas services are implemented?

The file has been created at `/home/hj/2026/project/adelie-investment/frontend/src/hooks/useAgentTurns.js`. It contains the `useAgentTurns` custom hook with the following functionality:

- **Turn list derivation**: Filters and maps `assistantTurns` into a normalized `turns` array with consistent shape (id, assistantText, userPrompt, uiActions, status, model, structured, guardrail fields).
- **`activeTurnIndex` state**: Tracks which turn is currently displayed.
- **Auto-advance**: When new turns arrive (turn count increases), automatically advances to the latest turn. When turns are removed, clamps the index.
- **Swipe toast management**: Shows temporary toast messages (1.5s duration) for navigation feedback, with a one-time swipe hint on first use (persisted via `localStorage`).
- **`moveTurn(direction)`**: Navigates forward/backward with boundary checks and toast feedback.
- **Touch swipe handlers**: `handleSwipeTouchStart`, `handleSwipeTouchMove`, `handleSwipeTouchEnd` -- horizontal swipe detection with an 86px threshold.
- **Derived values**: `selectedTurn`, `isBrowsingPrevious`, `swipeProgress` (0-100 percentage of threshold).

import json

import uuid

from sqlalchemy import select, text
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from openai import AsyncOpenAI

logger = logging.getLogger("narrative_api.tutor")

try:
    from shared.langsmith_config import trace_context, create_run_metadata

except ImportError:

from app.core.config import get_settings
from app.core.database import get_db

    TutorChatRequest,
    TutorChatEvent,
    TutorRouteRequest,
    TutorRouteResponse,
)
from app.services import get_redis_cache
from app.services.tutor_engine import (
    _collect_glossary_context,
    _collect_db_context,
    _collect_stock_context,
    get_difficulty_prompt,
)
from app.services.stock_resolver import detect_stock_codes
from app.services.guardrail import run_guardrail
from app.services.investment_intel import (
    annotate_reachable_links,
    collect_stock_intelligence,
)
from app.services.query_presets import classify_intent, fetch_intent_context

router = APIRouter(prefix="/tutor", tags=["AI tutor"])

    10→
    11→from app.core.database import get_db
    12→from app.core.auth import get_current_user, get_current_user_optional
    13→from app.schemas.canvas import (
    14→    CanvasAnalyzeRequest,
    15→    CanvasPrecomputedResponse,
    16→    CTAFeedbackRequest,
    17→    CTAFeedbackResponse,
    18→    QuickQARequest,
    19→    QuickQAResponse,
    20→)
    21→
    22→logger = logging.getLogger("narrative_api.canvas")
    23→
    24→router = APIRouter(prefix="/canvas", tags=["canvas"])
    25→
    26→
    27→def _sse_event(event_type: str, data: dict) -> str:
    28→    """SSE 이벤트 포맷."""
    29→    return f"event: {event_type}\ndata: {json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)}\n\n"
    30→
    31→
    32→@router.post("/analyze")
    33→async def analyze_canvas(
    34→    request: CanvasAnalyzeRequest,
    35→    http_request: Request,
    36→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    37→    user=Depends(get_current_user_optional),
    38→):
    39→    """Canvas 분석 SSE 스트리밍 엔드포인트.
    40→
    41→    AI가 컨텍스트를 수집하고 분석을 스트리밍하며,
    42→    완료 시 다음 CTA를 생성하여 전달합니다.
    43→    """
    44→    from app.services.canvas.analyzer import run_canvas_analysis
    45→
    46→    async def event_generator():
    47→        try:
    48→            async for event_type, payload in run_canvas_analysis(
    49→                db=db,
    50→                request=request,
    51→                user=user,
    52→                disconnect_check=http_request.is_disconnected,
    53→            ):
    54→                yield _sse_event(event_type, payload)
    55→        except Exception as e:
    56→            logger.exception("Canvas analysis error: %s", e)
    57→            yield _sse_event("error", {"message": "분석 중 오류가 발생했습니다."})
    58→
    59→    return StreamingResponse(
    60→        event_generator(),
    61→        media_type="text/event-stream",
    62→        headers={
    63→            "Cache-Control": "no-cache",
    64→            "Connection": "keep-alive",
    65→            "X-Accel-Buffering": "no",
    66→        },
    67→    )
    68→
    69→
    70→@router.get("/precomputed", response_model=CanvasPrecomputedResponse)
    71→async def get_precomputed(
    72→    mode: str = Query("home", regex="^(home|stock|education)$"),
    73→    date: Optional[str] = Query(None, regex=r"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$"),
    74→    user=Depends(get_current_user_optional),
    75→):
    76→    """사전 연산된 Canvas 데이터 조회 (Redis 캐시)."""
    77→    from app.services.canvas.precompute import get_precomputed_canvas
    78→
    79→    result = await get_precomputed_canvas(mode=mode, date=date)
    80→    return result
    81→
    82→
    83→@router.post("/quick-qa", response_model=QuickQAResponse)
    84→async def quick_qa(
    85→    request: QuickQARequest,
    86→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    87→    user=Depends(get_current_user_optional),
    88→):
    89→    """드래그 선택 텍스트 즉석 설명 (비스트리밍)."""
    90→    from app.services.canvas.quick_qa import handle_quick_qa
    91→
    92→    return await handle_quick_qa(
    93→        db=db,
    94→        selected_text=request.selected_text,
    95→        canvas_context_summary=request.canvas_context_summary,
    96→        session_id=request.session_id,
    97→    )
    98→
    99→

"""Canvas Engine API routes — AI 선제 분석 + CTA 실행 + Quick QA."""

import json
import logging
from typing import Optional

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Query, Request
from fastapi.responses import StreamingResponse
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user, get_current_user_optional
from app.schemas.canvas import (
    CanvasAnalyzeRequest,
    CanvasPrecomputedResponse,
    CTAFeedbackRequest,
    CTAFeedbackResponse,
    QuickQARequest,
    QuickQAResponse,
)

logger = logging.getLogger("narrative_api.canvas")

router = APIRouter(prefix="/canvas", tags=["canvas"])


def _sse_event(event_type: str, data: dict) -> str:
    """SSE 이벤트 포맷."""
    return f"event: {event_type}\ndata: {json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)}\n\n"


@router.post("/analyze")
async def analyze_canvas(
    request: CanvasAnalyzeRequest,
    http_request: Request,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user=Depends(get_current_user_optional),
):
    """Canvas 분석 SSE 스트리밍 엔드포인트.

    AI가 컨텍스트를 수집하고 분석을 스트리밍하며,
    완료 시 다음 CTA를 생성하여 전달합니다.
    """
    from app.services.canvas.analyzer import run_canvas_analysis

    async def event_generator():
        try:
            async for event_type, payload in run_canvas_analysis(
                db=db,
                request=request,
                user=user,
                disconnect_check=http_request.is_disconnected,
            ):
                yield _sse_event(event_type, payload)
        except Exception as e:
            logger.exception("Canvas analysis error: %s", e)
            yield _sse_event("error", {"message": "분석 중 오류가 발생했습니다."})

    return StreamingResponse(
        event_generator(),
        media_type="text/event-stream",
        headers={
            "Cache-Control": "no-cache",
            "Connection": "keep-alive",
            "X-Accel-Buffering": "no",
        },
    )


@router.get("/precomputed", response_model=CanvasPrecomputedResponse)
async def get_precomputed(
    mode: str = Query("home", regex="^(home|stock|education)$"),
    date: Optional[str] = Query(None, regex=r"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$"),
    user=Depends(get_current_user_optional),
):
    """사전 연산된 Canvas 데이터 조회 (Redis 캐시)."""
    from app.services.canvas.precompute import get_precomputed_canvas

    result = await get_precomputed_canvas(mode=mode, date=date)
    return result


@router.post("/quick-qa", response_model=QuickQAResponse)
async def quick_qa(
    request: QuickQARequest,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    user=Depends(get_current_user_optional),
):
    """드래그 선택 텍스트 즉석 설명 (비스트리밍)."""
    from app.services.canvas.quick_qa import handle_quick_qa

    return await handle_quick_qa(
        db=db,
        selected_text=request.selected_text,
        canvas_context_summary=request.canvas_context_summary,
        session_id=request.session_id,
    )


@router.post("/cta-feedback", response_model=CTAFeedbackResponse)
async def cta_feedback(
    request: CTAFeedbackRequest,
    user=Depends(get_current_user_optional),
):
    """CTA 피드백 기록 (LangSmith 전송)."""
    from app.services.canvas.cta_generator import record_cta_feedback

    await record_cta_feedback(
        session_id=request.session_id,
        turn_index=request.turn_index,
        cta_id=request.cta_id,
        action=request.action,
        time_to_click_ms=request.time_to_click_ms,
    )
    return CTAFeedbackResponse(status="ok")

"""튜터 세션 CRUD API 엔드포인트."""

import json
import logging
import uuid
from datetime import datetime

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, Query
from openai import AsyncOpenAI
from pydantic import BaseModel
from sqlalchemy import select, desc
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.core.config import get_settings
from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.tutor import TutorSession, TutorMessage
from app.services import get_redis_cache
from app.services.chart_storage import get_chart_presigned_url

logger = logging.getLogger("narrative_api.tutor_sessions")

router = APIRouter(prefix="/tutor", tags=["tutor sessions"])


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 복습 카드 메타데이터 생성 헬퍼
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def _extract_simple_review_meta(messages: list[TutorMessage]) -> dict:
    """LLM 없이 간단히 메타데이터 추출."""
    contents = [m.content for m in messages if m.role == "assistant" and m.content]
    summary = (contents[0][:200] if contents else "")
    return {"summary": summary, "key_points": [], "topics": []}


async def _generate_review_card_meta(messages: list[TutorMessage]) -> dict:
    """대화 내용에서 복습 카드 메타데이터를 LLM으로 생성한다."""
    if not messages:
        return {"summary": "", "key_points": [], "topics": []}

    # 대화 내용을 텍스트로 변환 (최근 20개)
    conversation_text = "\n".join(
        f"{'사용자' if m.role == 'user' else 'AI'}: {m.content[:500]}"
        for m in messages[-20:]
    )

    settings = get_settings()
    api_key = settings.OPENAI_API_KEY
    if not api_key:
        return _extract_simple_review_meta(messages)

    try:
        client = AsyncOpenAI(api_key=api_key)
        response = await client.chat.completions.create(
            model="gpt-4o-mini",
            temperature=0.3,
            max_tokens=500,
            response_format={"type": "json_object"},
            messages=[

"""AI Tutor related schemas."""

from typing import Any, Literal, Optional

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field


class TutorChatRequest(BaseModel):
    """Request for AI Tutor chat."""

    session_id: Optional[str] = None
    message: str
    context_type: Optional[Literal["briefing", "case", "comparison", "glossary"]] = None
    context_id: Optional[int] = None
    context_text: Optional[str] = None
    difficulty: str = "beginner"
    use_web_search: bool = False
    response_mode: Literal["plain", "canvas_markdown"] = "plain"
    structured_extract: bool = False


class TutorRouteRequest(BaseModel):
    """Request for route decision between inline action/reply and canvas."""

    message: str
    mode: Literal["home", "stock", "education", "my", "agent"] = "home"
    context_text: Optional[str] = None
    ui_snapshot: Optional[dict] = None
    action_catalog: list[dict] = Field(default_factory=list)
    interaction_state: Optional[dict] = None


class TutorRouteResponse(BaseModel):
    """Route decision response for AgentDock."""

    decision: Literal["inline_action", "inline_reply", "open_canvas", "open_chat"]
    action_id: Optional[str] = None
    inline_text: Optional[str] = None
    canvas_prompt: Optional[str] = None
    confidence: float = 0.0
    reason: str = ""


class TutorChatEvent(BaseModel):
    """SSE event for AI Tutor chat."""

    type: Literal["thinking", "tool_call", "guardrail_notice", "text_delta", "visualization", "ui_action", "done", "error"]
    content: Optional[str] = None
    tool: Optional[str] = None
    args: Optional[dict] = None
    session_id: Optional[str] = None
    total_tokens: Optional[int] = None
    sources: Optional[list[dict]] = None
    actions: Optional[list[dict]] = None
    model: Optional[str] = None
    reasoning_effort: Optional[str] = None
    search_used: Optional[bool] = None
    response_mode: Optional[str] = None
    structured: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    guardrail_decision: Optional[str] = None
    guardrail_mode: Optional[str] = None
    error: Optional[str] = None

"""Canvas Engine schemas — AI 선제 제시 + CTA 기반 분석 시스템."""

from typing import Any, Literal, Optional
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field


class CanvasAnalyzeRequest(BaseModel):
    """POST /api/v1/canvas/analyze — SSE 스트리밍 분석 요청."""
    session_id: Optional[str] = None
    message: str
    mode: Literal["home", "stock", "education"] = "home"
    context_type: Optional[Literal["briefing", "case", "comparison", "glossary"]] = None
    context_id: Optional[int] = None
    context_text: Optional[str] = None  # JSON string with context envelope
    difficulty: str = "beginner"
    use_web_search: bool = False
    cta_source: Optional[str] = None  # 이전 CTA에서 진입한 경우 CTA ID
    turn_index: int = 0  # 현재 턴 인덱스


class CanvasPrecomputedRequest(BaseModel):
    """GET /api/v1/canvas/precomputed 쿼리 파라미터."""
    mode: Literal["home", "stock", "education"] = "home"
    date: Optional[str] = None  # YYYY-MM-DD, default=today


class CanvasPrecomputedResponse(BaseModel):
    """사전 연산 캐시 응답."""
    cached: bool = False
    date: str
    mode: str
    analysis_md: Optional[str] = None
    ctas: list[dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)
    chart_json: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    sources: list[dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)
    generated_at: Optional[str] = None


class QuickQARequest(BaseModel):
    """POST /api/v1/canvas/quick-qa — 드래그 선택 즉석 설명."""
    selected_text: str = Field(..., min_length=2, max_length=500)
    canvas_context_summary: Optional[str] = None  # 현재 Canvas 분석 요약
    session_id: Optional[str] = None


class QuickQAResponse(BaseModel):
    """Quick QA 응답 (비스트리밍)."""
    explanation: str
    stock_info: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None  # 종목 감지 시 enriched 데이터
    sources: list[dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)
    detected_stock: Optional[str] = None  # 감지된 종목명


class CTAFeedbackRequest(BaseModel):
    """POST /api/v1/canvas/cta-feedback — CTA 피드백 기록."""
    session_id: str
    turn_index: int
    cta_id: str
    action: Literal["clicked", "ignored"]
    time_to_click_ms: Optional[int] = None


class CTAFeedbackResponse(BaseModel):
    """CTA 피드백 응답."""
    status: str = "ok"


class CanvasSSEEvent(BaseModel):
    """Canvas SSE 이벤트 구조."""
    type: Literal[
        "phase", "text_delta", "visualization", "cta",
        "sources", "done", "error", "guardrail_notice"
    ]
    content: Optional[str] = None
    phase: Optional[str] = None  # thinking, context_collection, analyzing, chart_generation
    chart_json: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    ctas: Optional[list[dict[str, Any]]] = None
    sources: Optional[list[dict[str, Any]]] = None
    session_id: Optional[str] = None
    total_tokens: Optional[int] = None
    model: Optional[str] = None
    guardrail_decision: Optional[str] = None
    error: Optional[str] = None
